en_title: LEGO Donkey Kong Arcade Set Officially Announced
cn_title: 乐高正式公布《大金刚》街机套装
subtitle: 经典第一关变成可互动积木模型

paragraphs.en: It’s finally official: LEGO has announced a set based on the classic Donkey Kong arcade cabinet. After a leak or two, LEGO Donkey Kong Arcade is officially scheduled for release on August 1, with a price tag of $199.99. You can see it at the LEGO Store here .
paragraphs.cn: 终于官宣了：乐高公布了一款以经典《大金刚》街机框体为原型的套装。在经历一两次泄露后，乐高《大金刚》街机套装现已正式定于8月1日发售，售价199.99美元(约合人民币1356元)。你可以前往乐高商店查看。

paragraphs.en: LEGO Donkey Kong Arcade is comprised of 1,367 pieces and contains many moving parts. Because of the retro subject matter and the complexity of the build, LEGO Donkey Kong Arcade is aimed at the 18+ age bracket, making it one of the many LEGO sets for adults .
paragraphs.cn: 乐高《大金刚》街机套装由1,367块零件组成，并包含许多可动部件。由于题材复古且拼搭较为复杂，这款套装面向18岁以上人群，属于乐高众多成人套装之一。

paragraphs.en: Once assembled, it becomes an interactive game that looks remarkably like the original arcade cabinet. It has the big Donkey Kong logo at the top and character images on all four corners of the “display.” There’s a barrel-release lever below, along with a joystick and Jump button. The screen depicts a remarkable (if slightly simplified) re-creation of the game’s first level, complete with Donkey Kong, Lady, and Jumpman on a construction site. It even has a flaming oil drum and hammer power-ups.
paragraphs.cn: 拼搭完成后，它会变成一款互动模型，外观与原版街机框体极为相似。顶部印有醒目的《大金刚》标志，「屏幕」四角也有角色图案。下方设有木桶释放杆、摇杆和跳跃按钮。屏幕以略微简化却相当还原的方式重现了游戏第一关：大金刚、Lady和Jumpman齐聚建筑工地，甚至连燃烧的油桶和锤子强化道具也做了出来。

paragraphs.en: It’s also interactive. You can pull the lever to release a barrel (there are 21 in the set), sending it rolling down through the level. Just like in the real game, you can use the joystick to move Jumpman, and press the button to make him jump. There’s even a behind-the-set mechanism you build that moves the barrels at the bottom back to the top. It’s pretty ingenious.
paragraphs.cn: 它还真的可以互动。拉动控制杆即可释放一个木桶（套装中共有21个），让它沿关卡向下滚动。和真实游戏一样，你可以用摇杆移动Jumpman，再按下按钮让他跳跃。套装背面甚至还有一套需要自行拼搭的机构，能把落到底部的木桶重新送回顶端，设计相当巧妙。

paragraphs.en: The Donkey Kong arcade game originally came out in 1981. It was a huge hit, and a precursor to the Mario series we know now. The hero is an early version of Mario, known as Jumpman, and the damsel in distress is an early version of Pauline, known as Lady. To my delicate sensibility, the whole thing gives otherworldly “early Simpsons” vibes, as the characters would evolve in later Nintendo games. But it’s great to see this piece of history get such a cool LEGO set of its own.
paragraphs.cn: 《大金刚》街机游戏最初于1981年推出。它大获成功，也是我们如今熟悉的《马力欧》系列的前身。主角是马力欧的早期形象，当时名为Jumpman；等待救援的女性则是宝琳的早期形象，当时名为Lady。以我敏感的审美来看，由于这些角色后来在任天堂游戏中逐渐演变，整套作品散发着一种超现实的「早期《辛普森一家》」气质。不过，能看到这段游戏史拥有一款如此出色的专属乐高套装，依然令人高兴。

paragraphs.en: This is the latest in a long line of LEGO Nintendo sets . I hope to see many more in the future.
paragraphs.cn: 这是乐高众多任天堂主题套装中的最新一款，希望未来还能看到更多。

summary: 乐高正式公布由1,367块零件组成的《大金刚》街机套装，售价199.99美元(约合人民币1,356元)，将于8月1日发售；成品可通过控制杆、摇杆和按钮重现经典第一关的互动玩法。
opus_summary: 乐高把1981年的经典《大金刚》街机变成了可互动积木模型：1,367块零件、21个可滚动木桶，还有摇杆和跳跃按钮。套装将于8月1日发售。
